reference: Check your electrocardiogram during the time of palpitation. Also, get a two-dimensional echocardiogram of the heart done. If normal, get thyroid function tests along with electrolyte levels done. If all are normal, then you need to be investigated further.
text: Check your electrocardiogram during the time of palpitation. Also, get a two-dimensional echocardiogram of the heart done. If normal, get thyroid function tests along with electrolyte levels done. If all are normal, then you need to be investigated further.
